title: Introducing PalmScript, a vibe-coded language for signal research and strategy execution
author: Original_Yam_2109
selftext:
Basically I always wanted a replacement for Pinescript that was open. You just need to compile the binary and get your agent to read the docs with the CLI, then build an strategy and backtest it.

If you want to contribute get your agent to improve the language / runtime and publish a PR, it will be reviewed and merged ---> [https://github.com/journeytosilius/palmscript](https://github.com/journeytosilius/palmscript)

comments.author: Patient_Kangaroo4864
comments.body: Open Pine replacement is nice, but right now it reads more like a wrapper around an agent than a language spec. Without clear semantics and deterministic backtests, this won't replace Pine for serious work.

comments.author: Patient-Bumblebee
comments.body: Why use this instead of just condensing your strategy into a text prompt using Claude or GPT and running it on [Everstrike](https://everstrike.io)?
